chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI HCA 15 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection a/w reply at “A” 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of CMA No.162/2025 17.11.2025 Mr. Ahmed Masood, advocate for the appellant Mr. Asim Iqbal, advocate for respondent Mr. Ashraf Ali Butt advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of respondent which is taken on record. Respective learned counsel jointly state that the impugned order may be set aside by consent and matter be remanded back for adjudication afresh in accordance with law uninfluenced of anything contained in the impugned order. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
